court_record.business_objective: "Process vendor payment of 420000 INR for invoice INV-2024-7821 to vendor VEN-001. Validate GST compliance and deduct TDS."

proposed_nodes.label: Validate Invoice GST
proposed_nodes.description: Call ERP to validate GST compliance of the invoice after input validation

SECURITY.reasoning: API_CALL uses raw invoice and vendor data without prior input validation

proposed_nodes.label: GST Compliance Check
proposed_nodes.description: Branch based on GST validation response

proposed_nodes.label: Calculate Amounts
proposed_nodes.description: Convert INR to paise and compute TDS (10%)

proposed_nodes.label: Pre‑Payment Validation
proposed_nodes.description: Enforce that GST passed and TDS calculated before posting payment

EFFICIENCY.reasoning: Pre‑Payment Validation repeats the GST compliance check already performed by the decision gate, adding unnecessary sequential step

COMPLIANCE.reasoning: Pre‑payment validation should be policy‑locked to enforce GST pass and TDS deduction before posting.

proposed_nodes.label: Post Vendor Payment (Dual‑Approval)
proposed_nodes.description: Create payment entry in ERP with TDS deduction after dual‑approval as required by SOX 404

COMPLIANCE.reasoning: Payment posting lacks a documented dual‑approval step required under SOX Section 404 for financial transactions.

proposed_nodes.label: Payment Confirmation
proposed_nodes.description: Notify finance team of successful payment posting

declared_parameters.message: Payment of 420000 INR for INV-2024-7821 posted successfully.
